FR-01.title: Event Creation
requirements: Create events with title, description, date, time, and venue
Support multiple event types (conference, workshop, concert, webinar)
Upload event banner and promotional images
Set ticket types and pricing tiers
acceptance_criteria: Ticket types show with correct prices

FR-02.title: Ticket Booking
acceptance_criteria: Events searchable by keyword and category

FR-03.title: Venue Management
requirements: Add venues with capacity, address, and floor plan
Seat map creation for assigned seating
acceptance_criteria: Seat map renders and allows selection

FR-04.title: Speaker and Agenda Management
requirements: Add speakers with bio, photo, and topic
Create event agenda with time slots

FR-05.title: Attendee Check-in
requirements: QR code scanning at venue entrance

FR-06.title: Event Analytics
requirements: Ticket sales reports and revenue tracking

FR-07.title: Sponsorship Management
requirements: Sponsor profile pages with logo and description
acceptance_criteria: Sponsors visible based on tier level

FR-08.title: Email Campaign Management
requirements: Send invitation emails to mailing lists
Post-event thank you and survey emails

FR-09.title: Virtual Event Support
requirements: Live streaming integration for virtual events

FR-10.title: Refund and Cancellation
requirements: Attendee can request refund per policy
Event cancellation by organizer with full refund

FR-01.title: Build Event CRUD API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/events (title, description, datetime, venue_id, type, images). POST /api/events/:id/tickets (ticket types with name, price, quantity, description). PATCH and DELETE endpoints.

FR-01.title: Build Event Creation Wizard
FR-01.description: Create multi-step form: basic info (title, type, dates), venue selection, ticket tier setup with pricing, banner/image upload, and preview before publishing.

FR-01.title: Create Event Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design events table: id, organizer_id, title, description, type, start_datetime, end_datetime, venue_id, banner_url, status. tickets table: event_id, name, price, quantity, sold_count.

FR-02.title: Build Booking API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/events/search. POST /api/bookings (event_id, ticket_type, quantity). Payment integration. Generate QR code e-ticket. Send confirmation email.

FR-02.title: Build Booking Flow UI
FR-02.description: Create event browse page, event detail with ticket selector, checkout with payment form, and confirmation page with QR code e-ticket download.

FR-03.title: Build Venue API
FR-03.description: Create CRUD for venues (name, address, capacity, floor_plan). Room configuration CRUD. Seat map editor API. Availability calendar with booking checks.

FR-03.title: Build Venue Management UI
FR-03.description: Create venue editor with address map, room configuration form, interactive seat map builder, and availability calendar view.

FR-04.title: Build Speaker and Agenda API
FR-04.description: Create CRUD for speakers (name, bio, photo, company). Agenda CRUD: POST /api/events/:id/sessions (time, room, speaker_ids). POST /api/sessions/:id/bookmark for attendees.

FR-04.title: Build Agenda UI
FR-04.description: Create agenda page with timeline view grouped by track/room. Speaker profile cards. Session detail with bookmark button. My Schedule view for bookmarked sessions.

FR-05.title: Build Check-in API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/checkin/scan (QR code validation). Real-time attendance WebSocket. Badge data endpoint for print integration. Kiosk mode with simplified UI.

FR-05.title: Build Check-in UI
FR-05.description: Create QR scanner using device camera, check-in confirmation screen, kiosk mode full-screen interface, and real-time attendance counter dashboard.

FR-06.title: Build Analytics API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/events/:id/analytics (sales, revenue, demographics). Session popularity metrics. POST /api/events/:id/survey (create). GET survey results aggregation.

FR-06.title: Build Analytics Dashboard
FR-06.description: Create event analytics page with sales charts, revenue tracking, demographic pie charts, session popularity bar charts, and survey results summary.

FR-07.title: Build Sponsorship API
FR-07.description: Create CRUD for sponsor tiers with benefits. POST /api/events/:id/sponsors (assign sponsor to tier). Sponsor profile CRUD. Visibility ordering by tier level.

FR-07.title: Build Sponsorship UI
FR-07.description: Create sponsor tier management, sponsor assignment interface, sponsor section on event page with logos sorted by tier, and sponsor profile pages.

FR-08.title: Build Email Campaign Service
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/campaigns/send (template, recipients). Scheduled reminder jobs (7 days, 1 day, 1 hour before). Post-event follow-up queue. Track opens/clicks via tracking pixel.

FR-08.title: Build Campaign Manager UI
FR-08.description: Create email campaign creator with template editor, recipient list selector, schedule settings, and analytics dashboard showing open/click rates per campaign.

FR-09.title: Build Virtual Event API
FR-09.description: Create live stream room endpoints (RTMP ingest, HLS output). WebRTC networking rooms. Screen share signaling. Virtual booth CRUD for sponsors.

FR-09.title: Build Virtual Event UI
FR-09.description: Create virtual event page with live stream player, networking room video chat grid, session screen share view, and sponsor virtual booth with content and chat.

FR-10.title: Build Refund API
FR-10.description: Create POST /api/bookings/:id/refund (validate against policy, calculate amount). Event cancellation endpoint triggering bulk refunds. Queue for processing within 7 days.

FR-10.title: Build Refund UI
FR-10.description: Create refund request form with policy display, amount preview. Organizer cancellation flow with attendee notification. Refund status tracker.
